criteria.name: AI Integration
criteria.description: The extent to which the app utilizes artificial intelligence to enhance user experience, such as through AI-generated content, personalized recommendations, or interactive AI features.
criteria.sources: App descriptions, official websites, user reviews.

criteria.name: User Engagement
criteria.description: The level of user interaction and activity within the app, including metrics like daily active users, session length, and user retention rates.
criteria.sources: App analytics reports, industry studies, user feedback.

criteria.name: Innovative Features
criteria.description: The presence of unique and novel functionalities that distinguish the app from competitors, such as AI-driven matchmaking, virtual avatars, or interactive AI companions.
criteria.sources: App feature lists, press releases, tech reviews.

criteria.name: Market Reach
criteria.description: The geographical availability and user base size of the app, indicating its popularity and accessibility across different regions.
criteria.sources: App store rankings, download statistics, company reports.

criteria.name: User Privacy and Security
criteria.description: The measures implemented by the app to protect user data and ensure secure interactions, including data encryption, privacy policies, and compliance with regulations.
criteria.sources: Privacy policies, security audits, user testimonials.
